case_title: 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. CURT KLAUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100050691) AS TO DEFENDANT KLAUS, CURT
DECLARATION OF KEVIN D. FREDERICK (TRANSACTION ID # 200008625) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2020, MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT PROVE UP HEARING - GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT SAME TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLAUS, CURT $6,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $675.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,425.00, SEE SCANNED DOC - ADDITIONALLY, WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THIS JUDGMENT & INJUNCTION, DEFENDANT CURT KLAUS SHALL: (A) REMOVE ALL DOGS EXCEPT TWO (2) FROM DEFENDANT'S CONDOMINIUM UNIT AT 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD, #13, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110; (B) CEASE & DESIST FROM FOSTER CARING ADDITIONAL DOGS AT THE ASSOCIATION; (C) KEEP DOGS ON LEASH AT ALL TIMES IN THE ASSOCIATION'S COMMON AREAS; (D) PREVENT DEFENDANT'S DOGS FROM URINATING OR DEFECATING IN THE STAIRWAYS; (E) CONTROL DOGS FROM BARKING EXCESSIVELY; AND (F) ALLOW ACCESS TO DEFENDANT'S CONDOMINIUM UNIT AT 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD, #13, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 FOR WATER LEAK PLUMBING INSPECTION.(VACATED PER ORDER FILED 12/29/20)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-03-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CURT KLAUS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE AND SERVE THE MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY SECTION 1005(B) OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. IN ADDITION, MOTIONS IN THIS CASE MUST BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501, WHICH HANDLES ALL CASES REGARDING THE ACQUISITION, OWNERSHIP, POSSESSION OF OR DAMAGE TO REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. Emily K. Andrews, (650) 288-8790 for Plaintiff 400 Alemany Boulevard Homeowners Assoication.

Defendant to file a response no later than December 31, 2020. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CURT KLAUS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Defendant did not file and serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by section 1005(b) of the Code of Civil Procedure. In addition, motions in this case must be heard in department 501, which handles all cases regarding the acquisition, ownership, possession of or damage to real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Curt Klaus.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kevin D. Frederick, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff 400 Alemany Boulevard Homeowners' Association. ("Association").
Michelle Roy, Property Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Roy appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Curt Klaus.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of the Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions was filed on April 18, 2019 and personally served on defendant Kurt Claus on August 8, 2019.
Default as to defendant Curt Klaus was entered on September 11, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed today, July 21, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 400 Alemany Boulevard Homeowners' Association, and against the defaulted defendant Curt Klaus, as follows:

1) Defendant Curt Klaus ("Defendant") shall within thirty (30) days after service of this Judgment and Injunction:

a) Remove all dogs except two (2) from Defendant's Condominium Unit at 400 Alemany Boulevard, #13, San Francisco, CA 94110;
b) Cease and desist from foster caring additional dogs at the Association;
c) Keep dogs on leash at all times in the Association's common areas;
d) Prevent Defendant's dogs from urinating or defecating in the stairways;
e) Control dogs from barking excessively; and
f) All access to Defendant's Condominium Unit at 400 Alemany Boulevard, #13, San Francisco, CA 94110 for water leak plumbing inspection.

2) Plaintiff is awarded attorney fees in the amount of $6,750.00 and costs in the amount of
$765.00, for a total of $7,515.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
